properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus my savior Your love is so much favor You are the great king of peace Your embrace is full of grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is nobody like you, God There is nobody like you, God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sing praise to our mighty God We give thanks to our mighty God He is pure and powerful Praise Him, Praise Him

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are our victory In every different story Were blind in the history But you made us all glory

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He leads the way And give us strength And give us hope And make us holy, holy, holy
